text: Would you rather never use a phone or never use a computer?
Would you rather live where it's always summer or always winter?
Would you rather have to hop everywhere or crawl everywhere?
Would you rather be able to fly or become invisible?
Would you rather live without music or live without movies?
Would you rather always say what you're thinking or never speak again?
Would you rather give up coffee or chocolate forever?
Would you rather have a terrible memory or déjà vu constantly?
Would you rather always be 10 minutes late or 20 minutes early?
Would you rather always have wet socks or always have sticky fingers?
Would you rather have unlimited money but never travel, or travel everywhere but live modestly?
Would you rather know how you die or when you die?
Would you rather speak every language fluently or play every instrument masterfully?
Would you rather relive the same day forever or lose all your memories?
Would you rather have a pause button or a rewind button for your life?
Would you rather be the funniest or the smartest person in the room?
Would you rather never age physically or never age mentally?
Would you rather have no taste or no smell?
Would you rather be famous for something terrible or unknown for something amazing?
Would you rather fight one horse-sized duck or a hundred duck-sized horses?
Would you rather only eat sweet things or only eat salty things?
Would you rather be able to read minds or predict the future?
Would you rather live underwater or in space?
Would you rather have no phone or no car?
Would you rather always be too hot or always be too cold?
Would you rather have unlimited free flights or unlimited free food for life?
Would you rather be able to teleport or be able to read thoughts?
Would you rather have a rewind button or a pause button for your life?
Would you rather never use social media again or never watch TV again?
Would you rather have a third eye or a third arm?
Would you rather be able to talk to animals or speak all human languages?
Would you rather explore the ocean depths or outer space?
Would you rather lose all your photos or lose all your videos?
Would you rather have a personal chef or a personal driver?
Would you rather always win arguments or always be right?
Would you rather have no internet for a month or no TV for a year?
Would you rather be able to freeze time or reverse time?
Would you rather have a pause button or a fast-forward button for your life?
Would you rather never age or never die?
Would you rather have super strength or super speed?
Would you rather live in the past or the future?
Would you rather have no sense of direction or no sense of time?
Would you rather be famous or anonymous?
Would you rather have a robot butler or a robot personal assistant?
Would you rather never have to sleep or never have to eat?
Would you rather speak in riddles or only speak the truth?
Would you rather have unlimited free clothes or unlimited free meals?
Would you rather have a photographic memory or an eidetic memory?
Would you rather be able to speak to the dead or see 10 minutes into your future?
Would you rather be able to control fire or water?
